prompt_text:
### Demographics: 68-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~7.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 92.4 kg; Height 165.1 cm; BMI 33.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.4%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 297mg/dL; 9 months ago 203mg/dL; 6 months ago 252mg/dL; 3 months ago 235mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 93.8kg; 9 months ago 92.3kg; 6 months ago 92.1kg; 3 months ago 91.9kg; current 92.4kg), Height (12 months ago 165.1cm; 9 months ago 165.1cm; 6 months ago 165.1cm; 3 months ago 165.1cm; current 165.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 35.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 33.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 18U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 209mg/g; 9 months ago 320mg/g; 6 months ago 332mg/g; 3 months ago 355mg/g; current 203mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 93mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 114mg/dL; 9 months ago 131mg/dL; 6 months ago 113mg/dL; 3 months ago 111mg/dL; current 119mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
